2026-06-08T23:51:57.882058+00:00.speaker: research_scientist
2026-06-08T23:51:57.882058+00:00.message: I'd suggest implementing a Temporal Fusion Transformer (TFT) model, as described in the paper "Temporal Fusion Transformers for Interpretable Multi-Horizon Time Series Forecasting" (2020). TFT has been shown to outperform traditional ARIMA models, especially when dealing with complex temporal dynamics in time series data. By incorporating TFT into our `arima.py` module, we can potentially reduce the RMSE of our `predictive_model` on the validation set.
